creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is most likely caused by an out-of-date hal.  Make sure -CURRENT is 
up-to-date, that you do not have devel/libusb installed, and that you 
have run "make delete-old" and "make delete-old-mibs".  Force an update 
of hal, and this problem should go away.
